name: Arena Star Group Ltd.
summary: Arena Star Group Ltd. engages in the real estate activities in Israel and Kazakhstan. Its Commercial Centers segment is involved in the development, construction, acquisition, leasing, management, and maintenance of malls and shopping centers. The company's Real Estate Development segment engages in the planning, development, and construction of residential and commercial projects. Its Others segment is involved in the maintenance of land in land rights. The company was formerly known as Israel Financial Levers (IFL) Ltd. and changed its name to Arena Star Group Ltd. in August 2014. Arena Star Group Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in Tel Aviv, Israel. Arena Star Group Ltd., operates as a subsidiary of Asian Service Trade Control Rte. Ltd.
